method: vitest unit + integration tests drive every testable behavior contract. Browser / stripe-cli user-testing deferred to an aggregated Playwright pass at end-of-mission (same pattern used for foundation AUTH assertions). M2 delivers a complete Stripe API surface + billing UI that can be driven end-to-end once real sk_test_ keys replace stripe-mock.

VAL-BILLING-001.evidence: dashboard layout redirect — deterministic, no browser needed

VAL-BILLING-002.evidence: code logic unit-tested via page-model; browser confirmation pending Playwright pass

VAL-BILLING-003.evidence: trialCountdownDays branch covered by page-model tests; Playwright pending

VAL-BILLING-007.evidence: 400 on missing/malformed/wrong-secret signature across 4 test variants

VAL-BILLING-008.evidence: fresh signed event -> 200 with real Stripe SDK + live Supabase

VAL-BILLING-010.evidence: duplicate event_id replay with intermediate profile mutation survives — no re-process

VAL-BILLING-011.evidence: subscription sync writes stripe_subscription_id + plan_id + status + period dates

VAL-BILLING-012.evidence: trialing -> past_due status transition + plan switch Starter -> Pro verified

VAL-BILLING-014.evidence: profile-side period rollover works; usage_counters reset activates when M3 adds the table

VAL-BILLING-023.evidence: same API supports downgrade — Stripe issues credit automatically

VAL-BILLING-024.evidence: invoice list fetch + cap-at-12 in page-model; Playwright pending

VAL-BILLING-025.evidence: nextInvoiceIso mapped to current_period_end; Playwright pending

discoveredFollowUps: Playwright pass across /dashboard/billing for VAL-BILLING-002/003/024/025 (UI evidence). Naturally batches with foundation's 3 deferred AUTH assertions (007/008/010).
VAL-BILLING-014 re-confirms as 'passed' in M3 when quota-reset-on-invoice-paid lands the usage_counters table.
Brandon swap sk_test_... for stripe-mock once ready; scripts/create-stripe-prices.mjs populates stripe_price_id for real prices.
result: PASS — milestone sealed. No blocking failures. 4 UI assertions + 1 cross-milestone assertion deferred with documented follow-up paths.
